description: You are a constellation operations engineer replacing a failed broadband satellite. Using the specification document at ~/Desktop/phasing_maneuver_spec.txt detailing the target constellation slot and the available on-orbit spare, design and run a GMAT mission script to execute a two-impulse Hohmann transfer phasing maneuver. The SPARE must drift in its lower orbit until the correct phase lead angle is reached, then perform two prograde burns (transfer and circularization) to arrive at the TARGET_SLOT altitude exactly in phase with the TARGET_SLOT. Define both spacecraft in the script using a Point Mass Earth (Two-Body) force model. Save the GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/spare_phasing.script and write a summary report to ~/GMAT_output/phasing_results.txt containing the Wait_Time_Hours, Burn1_DeltaV_ms, Burn2_DeltaV_ms, Total_DeltaV_ms, and Final_Phase_Diff_deg (absolute difference between SPARE and TARGET_SLOT True Anomaly). Login credentials: username=ga, password=password123
